summary: Map-based application with location search, story floating on map, and sidebar layout features.
architectural_notes: Map search should pin searched location and display popular stories floating around that location on the map.
known_issues: No working search option currently exists in the map.

existing_features.title: Add a visible search input bar to the QissaMap page (QissaMapPage.tsx / QissaMapView.tsx) that allows the user to type a location name and search for it using the Nominatim geocoding API (already used in MapView.tsx).
When a location is found via search, fly/pan the map to that location and place a distinct pin marker at the searched coordinates to visually indicate the searched location.

After searching a location, fetch and display the most popular stories (sorted by likes or pins) within a reasonable radius (e.g., 10–20 km) of the searched coordinates, and render them as floating story cards or labeled markers on the map near the pinned location.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a working map search option where user can enter a location name, pin that location on the map, and show popular stories floating near that location.
